ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_title" TEXT /* Title of the television show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the show (e.g., Drama, Comedy) */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network that aired the show */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the show started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the show ended (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the show (e.g., Running, Cancelled, On Hold) */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Name of the show creator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the show */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the show's promotional image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show the season belongs to */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number */,
  "number_of_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the season */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the season's promotional image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor (e.g., Male, Female, Non-binary) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the actor */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the actor */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the actor's profile image */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name of the actor's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show the character belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the character */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the character */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the character's promotional image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the episode */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes about the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the episode in minutes */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Name of the episode's writer */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the episode's director */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the episode's promotional image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "castings" (
  "casting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casting record */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor playing the character */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character being portrayed */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode in which the character appears */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., Main, Guest, Recurring) */,
  "start_episode" INTEGER /* Episode number where the character first appears */,
  "end_episode" INTEGER /* Episode number where the character last appears (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the actor's performance in the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_castings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_castings_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_castings_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Producer, Director, Writer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_castings" (
  "episode_casting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode casting record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "casting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the casting record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_casting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_castings_casting_id FOREIGN KEY ("casting_id") REFERENCES castings ("casting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_castings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
